currentlyBroken.unit: NE-4:  At the 45th street Cross Passage to Tk 116 platform and Tks 34 & 35 platform.
chainNotes: Grand Central's 45th St cross passage: NE-4 is the sole elevator to the Track 116 and Tracks 34 & 35 platforms from this passage. It has been out of service since March 2023 (long-term outage). The other North End units (NE-1/2/3/5/6) are tracked but not yet modeled — passage topology unverified.
